description_long: This cash register features a robust, angular design with a dark metallic exterior and a recessed workspace. At the center, a prominent display screen is mounted above the main surface, showing green text on a dark background, suggesting a digital interface. Flanking the workspace are two control panels, each with a set of colored buttons and what appear to be indicator lights, likely for transaction input and operation. The structure is boxy and industrial, with visible screws and a matte finish, giving it a utilitarian appearance suitable for high-traffic urban environments. The rear and sides are solid and unadorned, emphasizing durability and security. The overall form suggests a heavy, stationary device designed for use at a service counter or kiosk.
description: A heavy, industrial-style cash register with a central digital display, side control panels, and a robust, matte-finished metal exterior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the digital display, workspace, and both side control panels with colored buttons and indicator lights.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the depth of the register and the angled workspace, with partial visibility of the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a solid, unbroken metal surface with no visible controls or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the depth and partial control panel, with the display screen visible from the side.
attribute_keypad_layout: two small control panels with several colored buttons and indicator lights, not a standard numeric grid
